series_metadata.series_description: The ODNR Office of Coastal Management maintains files related to applications for Submerged Lands Leases and Submerged Lands Permits (Ohio Revised Code Section 1506.11 and Ohio Administrative Code Section 1501-6). These files may contain applications and requests for Director’s consent; technical reviews, site assessments, photos; correspondence; maps and copies of aerial imagery; hearing transcripts; invoices, copies of payments, rate increase notices, and appraisals; executed lease instruments and executed permits; and processing documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Permanent, unless replaced with a legible electronic version ; Electronic: Permanent, Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Permanent
